title: Create and verify encrypted cluster secrets
intent: Provide a safe, reproducible sops-nix and age workflow for the shared K3s token without creating or exposing plaintext credentials.
proof_hooks: git diff --check; nix flake check --no-build --no-update-lock-file; nix develop --accept-flake-config -c ./scripts/validate-repo.sh; decapod validate
deferred_questions: Do not activate K3s until the operator has created encrypted secrets/cluster.yaml, tested recovery-key decryption, and recorded the protected recovery copy.
